title: Rewriting the map: clearer docs and a cleaner homepage
summary:
A day of spring cleaning: we stripped the marketing fluff from our docs, clarified the homepage, and made ElevenLabs text-to-speech cheaper.

We stripped the marketing fluff out of the FAQ and reworked the homepage copy. The focus is now squarely on what matters: how the platform works, developer earnings, and a clear split between what just shipped and what is coming next.

We aligned our ElevenLabs integration with their Scale plan, which means generating high-quality text-to-speech just got noticeably cheaper for everyone.
